auth.Description: Authentication method (API key, Instance Principal, Resource Principal, etc.).

bucket.Description: The name of the OCI Object Storage bucket.

config_file_profile.Description: Profile name from the OCI config file.

fingerprint.Description: The fingerprint of the user's API key.

key.Description: The name of the state file stored on the remote backend.

kms_key_id.Description: The OCID of a master encryption key used to call the Key Management service to generate a data encryption key or to encrypt or decrypt a data encryption key.

namespace.Description: The namespace of the OCI Object Storage.

private_key.Description: The private key for API authentication.

private_key_password.Description: Passphrase for the private key, if required.

private_key_path.Description: Path to the private key file.

region.Description: OCI region where the bucket is located.

sse_customer_algorithm.Description: The optional header that specifies "AES256" as the encryption algorithm.

sse_customer_key.Description: The optional header that specifies the base64-encoded 256-bit encryption key to use to encrypt or decrypt the data.

sse_customer_key_sha256.Description: The optional header that specifies the base64-encoded SHA256 hash of the encryption key. This value is used to check the integrity of the encryption key.

workspace_key_prefix.Description: The prefix applied to the non-default state path inside the bucket.
